posts.title: DiachronicSSL, a database for corpus of linguistic landscape
posts.text: Welcome to DiachronicSSL! This website contains LLS corpus from Shanghai Old French Concession of different times that the founders have searched and collected during their studies. Search for Corpus 编码 图像语料 描述 来源 FenyangR-国立音乐专科学校-租界时期 b Contact us:DiachronicLLS@shisu.xxx.cn
